creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Henry Hu from comment #3)

> 1. Do you have DCONF enabled?

devel/dconf is installed, but (sorry) I have no idea how to answer the question. There's no package message: 

% pkg info -x dconf
dconf-0.40.0_3
dconf-editor-3.38.3
% pkg query %M dconf

% pkg query %M dconf-editor

% 

No mention of DCONF in the FreeBSD Handbook, and I don't know how to interpret the manual page: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=dconf&sektion=1&manpath=FreeBSD-Ports>
